text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Victoryyy! That race was awful fun!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I saw so many big smiles when I crossed the finish
line!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
First place is the best—no doubt about it! How do
ya feel, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I'm beyond happy, thanks to you!
I know you can aim higher!
I know you can aim higher!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
First place is the best—no doubt about it! How do
ya feel, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I'm beyond happy, thanks to you!
I know you can aim higher!
I know you can aim higher!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's mighty kind of ya to say!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So we're both pleased as punch, then. Gosh, I just
love racing!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep puttin' smiles on everybody's
faces till even my family back home hears about
it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I've still got a long trek ahead of me before I
reach the top.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna keep doin' my best, Trainer!
